channel.title: Model Failure on Future Empowered
channel.description: Recent content in Model Failure on Future Empowered

item.title: The 15-Minute AI Fix Viability Scorecard
item.description: Before approving budget or developer time to fix a failing AI model, score the proposed solution across four operational dimensions.

item.title: The AI Model Diagnostic Framework
item.description: A three-layer sequential diagnostic process for AI model performance issues. Diagnose before you retrain.
